_comment: Per-biome harvestables + decor. Categories: trees (axe #trees), rocks (pickaxe #rocks), ore, formations, crystals. passable=false blocks walk (default for harvestables). Decor large=blocking; small flowers/bones may be passable. Sprites: resource_nodes/ + decor/ with 00-15 variants.

decor._comment: Every biome: large blocking props + small flora/bones/rocks. passable=true = walkable ground cover (flowers, bone scatter).

floor_pickup_density._comment: Per-cell chance that a stick or stone appears on a walkable ground cell.
